sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare(
            "
			SELECT t.name
				FROM $wpdb->terms AS t
				INNER JOIN $wpdb->term_taxonomy AS tt ON tt.term_id = t.term_id
				INNER JOIN $wpdb->term_relationships AS tr ON tr.term_taxonomy_id = tt.term_taxonomy_id
				INNER JOIN $wpdb->posts AS menu ON menu.ID = tr.object_id
				    AND menu.post_type = 'nav_menu_item'
    			WHERE menu.ID = %d
			",
            $menu_item_id
        ))

sinks.expression: printf( __( "We don't mean to bug you, but you've been using %s for some time now, and we were wondering if you're happy with the plugin. If so, could you please leave a review at wordpress.org? If you're not happy with %s, please %s.", 'codepress-admin-columns' ), '' . $product . '', $product, '' . __( 'click here', 'codepress-admin-columns' ) . '' )

printf( __('You can also find help on the %s, and %s.', 'codepress-admin-columns'), '' . __( 'Admin Columns forum on WordPress.org', 'codepress-admin-columns' ) . '', '' . __( 'find answers to frequently asked questions', 'codepress-admin-columns' ) . '' )

printf(
                    __("%s support is only available in Admin Columns Pro.", 'codepress-admin-columns'),
                    $this->get_label()
                )

printf(
                __(
                    "Admin Columns Pro offers full support for %s, allowing you to easily manage %s fields for your overviews.",
                    'codepress-admin-columns'
                ),
                $this->integration->get_title(),
                $this->integration->get_title()
            )

$wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare(
            "
			SELECT t.name
				FROM $wpdb->terms AS t
				INNER JOIN $wpdb->term_taxonomy AS tt ON tt.term_id = t.term_id
				INNER JOIN $wpdb->term_relationships AS tr ON tr.term_taxonomy_id = tt.term_taxonomy_id
				INNER JOIN $wpdb->posts AS menu ON menu.ID = tr.object_id
				    AND menu.post_type = 'nav_menu_item'
    			WHERE menu.ID = %d
			",
            $menu_item_id
        ))
printf( _x( 'This deprecated hook has %s on this site with this callback:', 'callback usages', 'codepress-admin-columns' ), '' . $count_string . '', )
printf( _x( 'This deprecated hook has %s on this site with these callbacks:', 'callback usages', 'codepress-admin-columns' ), '' . $count_string . '' )

printf( __( 'This site is using some actions or filters that have changed. Please read %s to resolve them.', 'codepress-admin-columns' ), sprintf( '%s', $this->documentation_url, __('our documentation', 'codepress-admin-columns') ) )
fwrite(STDERR, 'Composer detected issues in your platform:' . PHP_EOL.PHP_EOL . implode(PHP_EOL, $issues) . PHP_EOL.PHP_EOL)

sanitizers.expression:
$wpdb->prepare(
            "
			SELECT t.name
				FROM $wpdb->terms AS t
				INNER JOIN $wpdb->term_taxonomy AS tt ON tt.term_id = t.term_id
				INNER JOIN $wpdb->term_relationships AS tr ON tr.term_taxonomy_id = tt.term_taxonomy_id
				INNER JOIN $wpdb->posts AS menu ON menu.ID = tr.object_id
				    AND menu.post_type = 'nav_menu_item'
    			WHERE menu.ID = %d
			",
            $menu_item_id
        )

$wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT meta_value FROM {$wpdb->prefix}usermeta WHERE meta_key = %s AND meta_value != '' LIMIT 1",
            $meta_key
        )
